description.ko: 생명의 연결성을 표현하며, 무중력 환경 속에서 유기체의 리드미컬한 박동과 생체 발광 에너지의 흐름에 집중한 작품입니다.
description.en: A representation of the interconnectedness of life, focusing on the rhythmic pulse of organic matter and the flow of bioluminescent energy within a weightless environment.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Circulatory Arbor.' A monumental, breathing organic structure composed of #7FB069 translucent moss membranes and #2D5A3D vascular vines that pulse with rhythmic vitality. The entity is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Glowing #FFE66D golden sap flows through transparent capillary networks, exhaling a mist of bioluminescent spores. Macro focus on the semi-permeable cellular textures, fluid dynamics, Octane render, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh, capturing a divine organic flow and serene breathing atmosphere.
